item.name: Wind-up Philos
item.description:
By the by...you see it too, yes?

Use item to acquire the wind-up philos minion.
item.tooltip:
Believe, and walk in faith.
Let the light of your soul
shine for all to see.
   - Loyal Friend
item.specialactiondescription: Grants 10 action points to all allies within range who do not have similar actions.
